mountain.visual_direction: Misty mountain lake, small pavilion, soft lantern, quiet dock.
mountain.sound_direction: Water, distant bell, low warm drone, very slow melodic fragments.
mountain.motion_direction: Mist drift, water shimmer, lantern breathing.

cyber.slogan: When machines move faster, find somewhere slower.
cyber.visual_direction: Quiet cyber city, one human-lit room inside the machine world.
cyber.sound_direction: Soft synth, distant data pulse, slow breathing rhythm.
cyber.motion_direction: Neon mist and slow light pulse.

garden.slogan: Some answers wait in a quieter garden.
garden.visual_direction: Warm mountain villa, garden courtyard, dusk, soft lamps.
garden.sound_direction: Wind, leaves, distant piano, quiet room tone.
garden.motion_direction: Curtain movement, leaves, warm light flicker.

ocean.slogan: Find a harbor before the next crossing.
ocean.sound_direction: Low waves, distant horn, slow strings.

recovery.visual_direction: Moonlit room, water outside, soft curtain.
recovery.sound_direction: Breath-paced ambience, soft water, low pad.

manifesto.slogan: What should humans do with the time machines return?
manifesto.visual_direction: Quiet study, paper, stone, warm light.
manifesto.sound_direction: Room tone, faint pen, soft ambient.
manifesto.motion_direction: Lamp glow, dust particles, slow paper movement.
